option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<?import java.lang.String?> <?import javafx.geometry.Insets?> <?import javafx.scene.chart.BarChart?> <?import javafx.scene.chart.CategoryAxis?> <?import javafx.scene.chart.NumberAxis?> <?import javafx.scene.chart.PieChart?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Label?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.HBox?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.Priority?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.VBox?> <?import org.kordamp.ikonli.javafx.FontIcon?>
<VBox xmlns="http://javafx.com/javafx/21" xmlns:fx="http://javafx.com/fxml/1" fx:controller="com.example.currencyexchange.controller.DashboardController" spacing="18" styleClass="page"> <padding><Insets top="22" right="22" bottom="22" left="22"/></padding>
<HBox alignment="CENTER_LEFT" spacing="10" styleClass="page-header"> <VBox spacing="5"> <Label text="Dashboard" styleClass="page-title"/> <Label text="Современная аналитическая панель по сети обменных касс" styleClass="page-subtitle"/> </VBox> </HBox>
<HBox spacing="16"> <VBox spacing="8" prefWidth="220" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"> <styleClass> <String fx:value="stat-card"/> <String fx:value="gradient-blue"/> </styleClass> <Label text="Валюты" styleClass="stat-kicker"> <graphic><FontIcon iconLiteral="fas-coins" iconSize="13" styleClass="app-icon"/></graphic> </Label> <Label fx:id="currenciesCount" text="0" styleClass="stat-value"/> <Label text="активных валют в системе" styleClass="stat-title"/> </VBox> <VBox spacing="8" prefWidth="220" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"> <styleClass> <String fx:value="stat-card"/> <String fx:value="gradient-green"/> </styleClass> <Label text="Кассы" styleClass="stat-kicker"> <graphic><FontIcon iconLiteral="fas-cash-register" iconSize="13" styleClass="app-icon"/></graphic> </Label> <Label fx:id="cashDesksCount" text="0" styleClass="stat-value"/> <Label text="обменных точек подключено" styleClass="stat-title"/> </VBox> <VBox spacing="8" prefWidth="220" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"> <styleClass> <String fx:value="stat-card"/> <String fx:value="gradient-orange"/> </styleClass> <Label text="Операции" styleClass="stat-kicker"> <graphic><FontIcon iconLiteral="fas-random" iconSize="13" styleClass="app-icon"/></graphic> </Label> <Label fx:id="operationsCount" text="0" styleClass="stat-value"/> <Label text="обменных операций проведено" styleClass="stat-title"/> </VBox> <VBox spacing="8" prefWidth="220" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"> <styleClass> <String fx:value="stat-card"/> <String fx:value="gradient-pink"/> </styleClass> <Label text="Инкассации" styleClass="stat-kicker"> <graphic><FontIcon iconLiteral="fas-truck-loading" iconSize="13" styleClass="app-icon"/></graphic> </Label> <Label fx:id="incassationsCount" text="0" styleClass="stat-value"/> <Label text="операций инкассации оформлено" styleClass="stat-title"/> </VBox> </HBox>
<HBox spacing="18" VBox.vgrow="ALWAYS"> <VBox spacing="14" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS" VBox.vgrow="ALWAYS"> <styleClass> <String fx:value="section-card"/> </styleClass> <HBox alignment="CENTER_LEFT"> <VBox spacing="4"> <Label text="Динамика обменных операций" styleClass="section-title"> <graphic><FontIcon iconLiteral="fas-chart-bar" iconSize="14" styleClass="app-icon"/></graphic> </Label> <Label text="Последние 7 дней" styleClass="section-subtitle"/> </VBox> </HBox> <BarChart fx:id="operationsChart" categoryGap="18" barGap="6" legendVisible="false" minHeight="260" VBox.vgrow="ALWAYS" styleClass="modern-chart"> <xAxis> <CategoryAxis side="BOTTOM"/> </xAxis> <yAxis> <NumberAxis side="LEFT" forceZeroInRange="true"/> </yAxis> </BarChart> </VBox>
<VBox spacing="14" prefWidth="340"> <styleClass> <String fx:value="section-card"/> <String fx:value="compact-card"/> </styleClass> <VBox spacing="4"> <Label text="Рекомендации по кассам" styleClass="section-title"> <graphic><FontIcon iconLiteral="fas-lightbulb" iconSize="14" styleClass="app-icon"/></graphic> </Label> <Label text="Распределение текущих статусов" styleClass="section-subtitle"/> </VBox> <PieChart fx:id="recommendationChart" labelsVisible="false" legendVisible="true" minHeight="310" prefHeight="310" styleClass="modern-pie-chart" VBox.vgrow="ALWAYS"/> </VBox> </HBox>
<VBox spacing="14"> <styleClass> <String fx:value="section-card"/> </styleClass> <VBox spacing="4"> <Label text="Кассы, требующие внимания" styleClass="section-title"> <graphic><FontIcon iconLiteral="fas-exclamation-circle" iconSize="14" styleClass="app-icon"/></graphic> </Label> <Label text="Вместо большой таблицы — компактная лента приоритетов" styleClass="section-subtitle"/> </VBox> <VBox fx:id="alertsContainer" spacing="12"/> </VBox> </VBox>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<?import java.lang.String?> <?import javafx.geometry.Insets?> <?import javafx.scene.chart.BarChart?> <?import javafx.scene.chart.CategoryAxis?> <?import javafx.scene.chart.NumberAxis?> <?import javafx.scene.chart.PieChart?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Label?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.HBox?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.Priority?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.VBox?> <?import org.kordamp.ikonli.javafx.FontIcon?>
<VBox xmlns="http://javafx.com/javafx/21" xmlns:fx="http://javafx.com/fxml/1" fx:controller="com.example.currencyexchange.controller.DashboardController" spacing="18" styleClass="page"> <padding><Insets top="22" right="22" bottom="22" left="22"/></padding>
<HBox alignment="CENTER_LEFT" spacing="10" styleClass="page-header"> <VBox spacing="5"> <Label text="Dashboard" styleClass="page-title"/> <Label text="Современная аналитическая панель по сети обменных касс" styleClass="page-subtitle"/> </VBox> </HBox>
<HBox spacing="16"> <VBox spacing="8" prefWidth="220" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"> <styleClass> <String fx:value="stat-card"/> <String fx:value="gradient-blue"/> </styleClass> <Label text="Валюты" styleClass="stat-kicker"> <graphic><FontIcon iconLiteral="fas-coins" iconSize="13" styleClass="app-icon"/></graphic> </Label> <Label fx:id="currenciesCount" text="0" styleClass="stat-value"/> <Label text="активных валют в системе" styleClass="stat-title"/> </VBox> <VBox spacing="8" prefWidth="220" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"> <styleClass> <String fx:value="stat-card"/> <String fx:value="gradient-green"/> </styleClass> <Label text="Кассы" styleClass="stat-kicker"> <graphic><FontIcon iconLiteral="fas-cash-register" iconSize="13" styleClass="app-icon"/></graphic> </Label> <Label fx:id="cashDesksCount" text="0" styleClass="stat-value"/> <Label text="обменных точек подключено" styleClass="stat-title"/> </VBox> <VBox spacing="8" prefWidth="220" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"> <styleClass> <String fx:value="stat-card"/> <String fx:value="gradient-orange"/> </styleClass> <Label text="Операции" styleClass="stat-kicker"> <graphic><FontIcon iconLiteral="fas-random" iconSize="13" styleClass="app-icon"/></graphic> </Label> <Label fx:id="operationsCount" text="0" styleClass="stat-value"/> <Label text="обменных операций проведено" styleClass="stat-title"/> </VBox> <VBox spacing="8" prefWidth="220" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"> <styleClass> <String fx:value="stat-card"/> <String fx:value="gradient-pink"/> </styleClass> <Label text="Инкассации" styleClass="stat-kicker"> <graphic><FontIcon iconLiteral="fas-truck-loading" iconSize="13" styleClass="app-icon"/></graphic> </Label> <Label fx:id="incassationsCount" text="0" styleClass="stat-value"/> <Label text="операций инкассации оформлено" styleClass="stat-title"/> </VBox> </HBox>
<HBox spacing="18" VBox.vgrow="ALWAYS"> <VBox spacing="14" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS" VBox.vgrow="ALWAYS"> <styleClass> <String fx:value="section-card"/> </styleClass> <HBox alignment="CENTER_LEFT"> <VBox spacing="4"> <Label text="Динамика обменных операций" styleClass="section-title"> <graphic><FontIcon iconLiteral="fas-chart-bar" iconSize="14" styleClass="app-icon"/></graphic> </Label> <Label text="Последние 7 дней" styleClass="section-subtitle"/> </VBox> </HBox> <BarChart fx:id="operationsChart" categoryGap="18" barGap="6" legendVisible="false" minHeight="260" VBox.vgrow="ALWAYS" styleClass="modern-chart"> <xAxis> <CategoryAxis side="BOTTOM"/> </xAxis> <yAxis> <NumberAxis side="LEFT" forceZeroInRange="true"/> </yAxis> </BarChart> </VBox>
<VBox spacing="14" prefWidth="340"> <styleClass> <String fx:value="section-card"/> <String fx:value="compact-card"/> </styleClass> <VBox spacing="4"> <Label text="Рекомендации по кассам" styleClass="section-title"> <graphic><FontIcon iconLiteral="fas-lightbulb" iconSize="14" styleClass="app-icon"/></graphic> </Label> <Label text="Распределение текущих статусов" styleClass="section-subtitle"/> </VBox> <PieChart fx:id="recommendationChart" labelsVisible="false" legendVisible="true" minHeight="310" prefHeight="310" styleClass="modern-pie-chart" VBox.vgrow="ALWAYS"/> </VBox> </HBox>
<VBox spacing="14"> <styleClass> <String fx:value="section-card"/> </styleClass> <VBox spacing="4"> <Label text="Топ касс по операциям" styleClass="section-title"> <graphic><FontIcon iconLiteral="fas-exchange-alt" iconSize="14" styleClass="app-icon"/></graphic> </Label> <Label text="Последние 7 дней" styleClass="section-subtitle"/> </VBox> <VBox fx:id="alertsContainer" spacing="12"/> </VBox> </VBox>
